criterion: current ledger state must be read before searching
pass_rule: record admitted counts and refuse uniqueness/family claims at scaffold stage

criterion: candidate family must be generated without preselecting return-cell
pass_rule: define P templates or packet templates before scoring Q

criterion: candidate Q packet uses existing G900 body edges only
pass_rule: all selected target edges must resolve to body.edges entries

criterion: source packet P must determine target packet Q by rule R
pass_rule: rule minima or rule outputs must be deterministic and not hand-picked

criterion: candidate must satisfy permission-channel admission obligations
pass_rule: gate obligations pass before any channel admission

criterion: permission channel may be admitted only after gate pass
one-step history h(0)->h(1) must be supported
pass_rule: h(0)=P and h(1)=Q under R behind admitted permission channel

criterion: bounded finite information transport requires conserved observable
pass_rule: named signature preserved exactly across h(0)->h(1)

criterion: flux witness requires crossing of realization and conserved signature
pass_rule: finite information flux only, no physical flux
no physical transport, no energy flow, no force, no physics, no body mutation
